notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, relayed by PokeBeach. Per-pack odds: double rare 1/6 and ultra rare 1/13 in the rare slot; ACE SPEC 1/21 replacing the first reverse-holo slot; special illustration rare 1/45 and hyper rare 1/80 replacing the second reverse-holo slot (the set has NO regular illustration rares). Poke Ball (1/3) and Master Ball (1/20) foil pattern variants have no dedicated rarity id and are folded into the common/uncommon reverse filler mass, so their premium is not modeled. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. Special set: no booster box display (ETB, booster bundles, surprise boxes and collections only).
